description: Players ranked by distance covered or thrown. Farthest distance wins (DESC). Distances summed or best attempt used across rounds.

scoring_config.notes: Higher distance = better rank. Uses ScoreBasedStrategy (SUM, DESC). Units: meters or centimeters.

config_notes: No 1v1 matches — all players compete simultaneously in each round
Measurement units: meters (default), centimeters also supported
Shares aggregation logic with score_based (SUM, DESC)
Suitable for: long throw competitions, kick distance, jump distance
